title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 29 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 29 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 29 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/08/2024
Today, iron ore futures ﬂuctuated strongly, with the most-traded contract I2501 closing at 760 yuan/mt, up 0.53% for the day. Traders showed a fairwillingness to sell. Steel mills remained cautious, primarily restocking as needed.
